# fly_network_policies (Data Source)

Lists network policies for a Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_network_policies" "all" {
  app = "my-app"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The application name.

### Read-Only

- `policies` (Attributes List) The list of network policies. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Policy ID.
- `name` (String) Policy name.
- `rule` (Attributes List) Traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies--rule))

<a id="nestedatt--policies--rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies.rule`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Rule action.
- `direction` (String) Traffic direction.
- `port` (Attributes List) Port specifications. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies--rule--port))

<a id="nestedatt--policies--rule--port"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies.rule.port`

Read-Only:

- `port` (Number) Port number.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
